texto: If a wicked rake doesn’t kiss a young lady when they’re alone in a moonlit rose garden, might it mean he doesn’t intend to? There were rules about such things. Weren’t they written down somewhere? If not, then they should be. A Treatise on Rakes, written for Susceptible Young Ladies, by a Lady of Distinction.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Anna Bradley que provoca temas ligados a amor. Ao questionar “If a wicked rake doesn’t kiss a young lady when they’re alone in a moonlit rose garden, might it …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, kiss, rake, com foco em termino e rake.
